since_last: 37% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.39%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.36% · BTC +1.78% · Gold -0.50% · Nasdaq100 -0.29%. 37% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.39%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.39%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -3.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +15.97%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +15.97%, VRT +6.67%, MU +5.47%, PWR +5.33%, INTC +5.05%. Laggards: SPCX -15.68%, AVAV -10.75%, ARM -7.48%, PLTR -6.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -15.68% at $155.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -15.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
